variations.name: Video Hero
variations.functionalBehavior: Autoplays muted background video with heading overlay. Includes pause/play toggle button. Falls back to static image on mobile or low bandwidth.
acceptanceCriteria: Video autoplays muted on desktop (min-width: 1024px)
Static image displayed on mobile (max-width: 743px)
Pause/play button toggles video playback
H1 heading overlays on video/image with readable contrast
CTA link navigates to target on click
Full viewport width on all breakpoints

variations.name: Image Hero
variations.functionalBehavior: Full-width hero image with centered text overlay. Responsive image sizing via Scene7 presets.
acceptanceCriteria: Image spans full viewport width
Text overlay is centered and readable (contrast ratio >= 4.5:1)
Responsive image served via Scene7 $Hero$ preset
H1 heading renders in F37 Lineca Medium 40px/44px white
Optional CTA button renders as primary button style

variations.name: Simple Hero (Article)
variations.functionalBehavior: Full-width image only, no text overlay. Used as article header image.
acceptanceCriteria: Image spans full viewport width
No text overlay rendered
Image maintains aspect ratio across breakpoints
WebP format served with fallback

variations.name: Three Column Cards
variations.functionalBehavior: 3 cards in equal-width columns. Stacks to single column on mobile. Each card is fully clickable.
acceptanceCriteria: 3 cards display in equal-width columns at desktop (min-width: 1024px)
Cards stack vertically on mobile (max-width: 743px)
Each card shows image, heading, optional description, and CTA
Entire card area is clickable (not just CTA text)
Hover state shows visual feedback (shadow or color change)
Images maintain consistent aspect ratio

variations.name: Article Cards
variations.functionalBehavior: 3-column grid of article preview cards with rich metadata (category, date, read time).
acceptanceCriteria: Cards display in 3-column grid at desktop
Category tag renders as colored label
Date formats as 'Month DD, YYYY'
Read time shows as 'X Minute Read'
'Read Article' CTA is visible
Cards are fully clickable to article URL

variations.name: Default Carousel
variations.functionalBehavior: Horizontal carousel with prev/next navigation showing 1 press release at a time. 3 slides total. Auto-advances optional.
acceptanceCriteria: Carousel displays one slide at a time with prev/next arrows
Navigation arrows are clickable and cycle through slides
Date renders above headline
Headline is clickable link to press release
Touch swipe works on mobile
Keyboard navigation supported (arrow keys)

variations.name: FAQ Accordion
variations.functionalBehavior: Expandable Q&A items. Global 'Expand All / Collapse All' control. Only one item open at a time by default.
acceptanceCriteria: All items collapsed by default on page load
Clicking item header toggles expand/collapse with smooth animation
'Expand All' opens all items simultaneously
'Collapse All' closes all items simultaneously
aria-expanded attribute toggles correctly
Keyboard accessible (Enter/Space to toggle)
Content within answer supports rich text (links, lists, etc.)

variations.name: Medicine List Accordion
variations.functionalBehavior: Large accordion (50+ items) for medicine program listings. Each item contains medicine name and EN/ES download links.
acceptanceCriteria: All items collapsed by default
Global Expand All / Collapse All works for all 50+ items
Each item shows medicine name as header
Expanded content shows EN and ES PDF download links
PDF links open in new tab
Performance remains smooth with 50+ accordion items

variations.name: Image Left
variations.functionalBehavior: 50/50 layout with image on left, text + CTA on right. Stacks image-on-top on mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: Image occupies left 50% at desktop
Text content occupies right 50% at desktop
Stacks to single column on mobile (image on top)
CTA link renders in uppercase blue style
Image maintains aspect ratio

variations.name: Video Left
variations.functionalBehavior: Video thumbnail with play button on left, descriptive text/quote on right.
acceptanceCriteria: Video thumbnail with play button overlay on left
Duration badge visible (e.g. 'Watch 3:49')
Clicking play opens video player
Text/quote on right side
Responsive: stacks on mobile

variations.name: Inline Stat
variations.functionalBehavior: Large numerical display with optional prefix/suffix and descriptive label.
acceptanceCriteria: Number renders in large display font (F37 Lineca)
Prefix and suffix render adjacent to number
Label text renders below in smaller body font
Responsive sizing maintains readability

variations.name: Quote with Headshot
variations.functionalBehavior: Styled blockquote with circular headshot image and attribution (name, title, company).
acceptanceCriteria: Quote text renders in slightly larger font (italic)
Circular headshot (~100-150px diameter)
Name renders bold, title and org in regular weight
Visual distinction from surrounding body text (border/background)
Accessible: proper blockquote semantics

variations.name: Standalone Video
variations.functionalBehavior: Video player with poster image, title, description, and play button overlay.
acceptanceCriteria: Poster image displays initially with play button overlay
Duration badge visible
Click triggers video playback (inline or lightbox)
Video player controls visible during playback
Responsive: full-width on mobile

variations.name: Executive Grid
variations.functionalBehavior: Responsive grid of leadership profile cards. 2-3 columns at desktop, single column on mobile.
acceptanceCriteria: Cards display in 2-3 column responsive grid
Square headshot per card
Name in bold, title below
'Meet [Name]' link navigates to bio page
Single column on mobile
Cards maintain consistent height within row

variations.name: Executive Bio
variations.functionalBehavior: Full biography display with headshot, name, title, multi-paragraph narrative, and social link.
acceptanceCriteria: Square headshot rendered prominently
Name as H1 heading
Job title as styled subtitle
Biography paragraphs in readable body text
LinkedIn icon/link if provided
Single-column layout, narrow content width

variations.name: Default Exit Modal
variations.functionalBehavior: Modal dialog triggered when user clicks external link. Warns user they are leaving AbbVie. Two buttons: 'No, I disagree' (closes modal) and 'Yes, I agree' (proceeds to external URL).
acceptanceCriteria: Modal triggers on click of any external link (not whitelisted domains)
'No, I disagree' closes modal and stays on page
'Yes, I agree' opens external URL (new tab)
Modal has overlay backdrop
Focus trapped within modal when open
Escape key closes modal
Accessible: role=dialog, aria-modal=true

variations.name: Multi-Level Breadcrumb
variations.functionalBehavior: Horizontal breadcrumb trail showing page hierarchy. All levels except current page are clickable links.
acceptanceCriteria: Displays full path from section root to current page
Separator character between levels (> or /)
All ancestor levels are clickable links
Current page name displayed as plain text (not linked)
Renders in smaller font, gray-toned
Accessible: nav element with aria-label='breadcrumb'

variations.name: Default Metadata Bar
variations.functionalBehavior: Horizontal bar displaying article publish date, category tag (linked), and estimated reading time.
acceptanceCriteria: Date formatted as 'Month DD, YYYY'
Category renders as clickable tag linking to category listing page
Reading time shows as 'X Minute Read'
Horizontal layout with separator between elements
Smaller font size than body text
